title: Rogue Missions
entries: (Alchemy Easy) Go and pick up some basic reagents and return to the Guild without getting caught.
(Alchemy Easy) Deliver a poisoned weapon without getting caught.
(Alchemy Easy) Create a basic poison in quantity, and deliver it to a customer, get paid, and return without getting caught.
(Alchemy Easy) Create a basic potion in quantity and deliver it into enemy territory. Return with the money.
(Alchemy Easy) Create a previously unknown potion or potion in your skill level.
(Alchemy Medium) Harvest intermediate reagents in enemy territory and escape.
(Alchemy Medium) Create a previously unknown potion or potion in your skill level.
(Alchemy Medium) Steal a shipment of enemy alchemical goods worth at least 500gp.
(Alchemy Medium) Destroy an enemy's alchemical laboratory and escape
(Alchemy Hard) Create a previously unknown potion or potion in your skill level.
(Alchemy Hard) Successfully mix two advanced potions and get a favorable result.
(Alchemy Hard) Create an advanced potion in quantity and deliver it into enemy territory. Return with the money.
(Alchemy Hard) Oversee the successful application of at least 40 poisoned weapons with an advanced poison.
(Alchemy Hard) Successfully reduce your creation time by 25%.
(Assassination Easy) Track a target to a location and observe for 4 hours. Do not get caught or be seen. Signal a contact and return.
(Assassination Easy) Kill a target in ambush, through a fixed killzone and escape. Claim credit for it.
(Assassination Easy) Deliver a contact poison to a target in a crowded location. Escape.
(Assassination Easy) Track a target to a location and observe for 1 hour. Trigger a fixed trap and escape.
(Assassination Easy) Deliver ingested poison to a target in an public area. Escape.
(Assassination Medium) Kill a political target. Escape.
(Assassination Medium) Kill a target in his own home and steal goods worth at least 500gp.
(Assassination Medium) Kill a target with ingested poison only, at a specific time and date.
(Assassination Medium) Kill a group of targets with a fixed trap.
(Assassination Medium) Kill a group of targets in a public location and claim credit for it.
(Assassination Hard) Kill a royal target in a moving vehicle. Escape and claim credit for it.
(Assassination Hard) Kill a political target at a public function with contact poison. Escape.
(Assassination Hard) Kill a group of targets spread across several locations on the same day. Claim credit for it.
(Assassination Hard) Kill a group of targets with ingested poison only, at a specific time and date.
(Assassination Hard) Kill a group of targets with no visible means of assassination on the corpse.
(Blackmail Easy) Pick up a payment from a dead drop without being seen.
(Blackmail Easy) Follow target and observe for 4 hours without being seen. Obtain 'dirt' on the target. Present blackmail terms worth at least 10gp/month. Escape.
(Blackmail Easy) Pick up a payment from a target in enemy territory. Escape.
(Blackmail Easy) Collect evidence against a target in enemy territory. Escape.
(Blackmail Easy) Collect evidence on a target in a public location without being seen.
(Blackmail Medium) Collect evidence on a political target without being seen.
(Blackmail Medium) Collect payment from a target, in public, and escape without being identified.
(Blackmail Medium) Follow target and observe for 24 hours without being seen. Present blackmail terms worth at least 100gp/month. Successfully blackmail for 6 months.
(Blackmail Medium) Pick up a payment from a political target in enemy territory. Escape and
(Blackmail Medium) Collect enough evidence to blackmail 3 targets in one month.
(Blackmail Hard) Collect evidence on a royal target without being identified. Blackmail for at least 1000gp/month. Successfully blackmail for at least 3 months.
(Blackmail Hard) Maintain a group of at least 3 targets successfully for at least 1 year. Blackmail must be at least 500gp/month.
(Blackmail Hard) Successfully blackmail 1 target for 750gp/month. Maintain for at least 3 months.
(Blackmail Hard) Collect evidence to blackmail 3 political targets in one month.
(Blackmail Hard) Collect enough evidence on your allies to ensure a clean exit strategy, if needed.
(Burglary Easy) Steal 10gp worth of goods from a home.
(Burglary Easy) Steal 20gp worth of goods from a business.
(Burglary Easy) Break into a safe and escape with goods worth at least 20gp.
(Burglary Easy) Disarm 3 traps and retreive the package. Escape.
(Burglary Easy) Place a target location under surveillance without being seen for 4 hours.
(Burglary Medium) Break into a shop with magical defenses. Steal at least 500gp worth of goods.
(Burglary Medium) Steal 250gp worth of goods from a home or business.
(Burglary Medium) Break into a vault and escape with goods worth at least 500gp.
(Burglary Medium) Steal an object guarded by constant physical survelliance. Object should be worth at least 250gp.
(Burglary Medium) Steal an object from a political or royal location and escape. Object can be worth anything, but should be unique and memorable.
(Burglary Hard) Break into a royal location and steal goods worth at least 1000gp.
(Burglary Hard) Break into a location with physical and magical defenses, as well as constant physical survelliance. Steal an object worth at least 5000gp.
(Burglary Hard) Steal an artefact from any location. Escape and keep in your possession for at least 48 hours.
(Burglary Hard) Rob a moving vehicle of goods worth at least 1000gp and escape.
(Burglary Hard) Break into a Guild House and steal an object that is unique and memorable. Keep it for at least 48 hours.
(Con-Game Easy) Swindle a target out of 10gp or equivalent goods. Escape.
(Con-Game Easy) Swindle a target out of 20gp or equivalent goods. Escape.
(Con-Game Easy) Swindle a target and get the target to promise an additional 10gp later.
(Con-Game Easy) Swindle a target and retreive your original investment back as well as keeping the target's money. Escape.
(Con-Game Easy) Swindle 3 targets in one day. Any amount over 5gp.
(Con-Game Medium) Grift a target out of 500gp or equivalent goods.
(Con-Game Medium) Grift a target out of 500gp or equivalent goods and get the target to promise an additional 100gp later.
(Con-Game Medium) Swindle a target and get the target arrested before you escape.
(Con-Game Medium) Grift a target and retreive your initial investment back as well as keeping the target's money. Escape.
(Con-Game Medium) Run a Grift that takes 3 months to finalize and take at least 1000gp or equivalent goods from the target.
(Con-Game Hard) Grift a target out of 1000gp or equivalent goods and get the target arrested before you escape.
(Con-Game Hard) Grift a political or royal target for at least 500gp or equivalent goods.
(Con-Game Hard) Run 3 successful grifts in 1 month for at least 250gp or equivalent goods each.
(Con-Game Hard) Swindle a target out of at least 1000gp or equivalent goods and escape without using a distraction.
(Con-Game Hard) Become accepted as a legitimate agent in the commercial/political/royal world in a Life Grift.
(Fence Easy) Successfully identify and evaluate goods worth at least 10gp.
(Fence Easy) Successfully identify and evaluate a minor magical item.
(Fence Easy) Successfully identify a minor cursed item.
(Fence Easy) Identify 3 counterfeit items.
(Fence Easy) Sell stolen goods worth at least 20gp.
(Fence Medium) Successfully identify and evaluate goods worth at least 500gp.
(Fence Medium) Successfully identify and evaluate a major magical item.
(Fence Medium) Successfully identify a major cursed item.
(Fence Medium) Identify 3 counterfeit items and 3 forgeries in 1 month.
(Fence Medium) Sell stolen goods worth at least 500gp.
(Fence Hard) Successfully identify and evaluate goods worth at least 1000gp.
(Fence Hard) Successfully identify and evaluate an artefact.
(Fence Hard) Successfully sell stolen a set of linked magical items.
(Fence Hard) Successfully identify and evaluate goods in enemy territory and return with the goods to the Guild.
(Fence Hard) Sell stolen goods worth at least 1000gp.
(Fraud Easy) Steal an official paper without getting caught.
(Fraud Easy) Steal an official paper in enemy territory without getting caught.
(Fraud Easy) Create a forgery or counterfeit item and successfully use it without getting caught.
(Fraud Easy) Create 3 forgeries or counterfeit items worth at least 20gp.
(Fraud Easy) Successfully use a forgery or counterfeit item 3 times.
(Fraud Medium) Create a royal or political forgery/counterfeit and sell it for at least 500gp.
(Fraud Medium) Create a forgery/counterfeit object of artistic merit and sell it for at least 500gp.
(Fraud Medium) Steal polticial or royal papers and use them to create at least 3 forgeries.
(Fraud Medium) Create 3 forgery/counterfeit objects worth at least 250gp each.
(Fraud Medium) Create travel documents for a secondary political body. (like another Kingdom)
(Fraud Hard) Create a royal or political forgery/counterfeit and sell it for at least 1000gp.
(Fraud Hard) Create forgeries for at least 20 people to be used in one transaction.
(Fraud Hard) Create royal identification papers.
(Fraud Hard) Steal supplies to create travel, identity and official documents for at least 3 other political bodies.
(Fraud Hard) Create a counterfeit that for an object that is normally displayed in a public location and switch them.
(Gambling Easy) Win at least 10gp in one day
(Gambling Easy) Win at least 5gp from 3 different targets in one day
(Gambling Easy) Successfully cheat and win at least 10gp.
(Gambling Easy) Successfully bankrupt all opponents in one game.
(Gambling Easy) Successfully cheat and win at least 20gp.
(Gambling Medium) Win at least 250gp in one day
(Gambling Medium) Win at least 50gp from 3 different targets in one day
(Gambling Medium) Successfully cheat and win at least 500gp.
(Gambling Medium) Successfully bankrupt all opponents in one game and get the losers to agree to another game tomorrow.
(Gambling Medium) Successfully cheat a professional gambler and win at least 100gp.
(Gambling Hard) Cheat a gambling establishment of at least 1000gp.
(Gambling Hard) Win at least 1500gp in 1 day.
(Gambling Hard) Successfully cheat a professional gambler and win at least 500gp.
(Gambling Hard) Successfully win a game with at least 19 other competitors.
(Gambling Hard) Successfully rig a mechanical game or a racing competition to win at least 1000gp.
(Kidnapping Easy) Track a target for at least 4 hours without being seen.
(Kidnapping Easy) Track and observe a target in enemy territory for at least 1 hour without being seen.
(Kidnapping Easy) Aduct 1 minor target and hold for at least 48 hours. Demand a ransom of at least 10gp.
(Kidnapping Easy) Abduct 2 minor targets and hold for at least 24 hours. Demand a ransom of at least 20gp.
(Kidnapping Easy) Subdue a violent target and hold for at least 8 hours.
(Kidnapping Medium) Abduct a major target and hold for at least 24 hours. Demand a ransom of at least 500gp.
(Kidnapping Medium) Track a target for at least 24 hours without being seen.
(Kidnapping Medium) Abduct multiple targets and hold for at least 1 hour. Demand a ransom of at least 50gp per target.
(Kidnapping Medium) Abduct a political target and demand a ransom of at least 250gp. Release the target alive.
(Kidnapping Medium) Abduct a target from a moving vehicle.
(Kidnapping Hard) Abduct multiple targets from a moving vehicle.
(Kidnapping Hard) Abduct a royal target and demand a ransom of at least 1000gp. Release the target alive.
(Kidnapping Hard) Abduct a political target from a public place and demand a ransom of at least 500gp.
(Kidnapping Hard) Abduct at least 10 targets at the same time and hold them for at least 30 days.
(Kidnapping Hard) Abduct an enemy target in enemy territory and demand a ransom of at least 500gp.
(Narcotics Easy) Buy product from a rival worth at least 10gp and.
(Narcotics Easy) Collect money owed to the Guild by a non-paying customer.
(Narcotics Easy) Protect a product shipment from enemies for at least 24 hours.
(Narcotics Easy) Sell product worth at least 10gp.
(Narcotics Easy) Sell product worth at least 20gp.
(Narcotics Medium) Sell product worth at least 500gp for the month.
(Narcotics Medium) Buy product in enemy territory worth at least 500gp and escort it back to the Guild.
(Narcotics Medium) Ship product worth at least 500gp into enemy territory and collect the money and escape.
(Narcotics Medium) Set up at least 10 distributors for your product and maintain them for at least 30 days.
(Narcotics Medium) Start a production facility for your product and create raw goods worth at least 250gp per month.
(Narcotics Hard) Sell product worth at least 1000gp for the week.
(Narcotics Hard) Destroy an enemy's production facility and escape.
(Narcotics Hard) Set up at least 20 distributors for your product and maintain them for 3 months.
(Narcotics Hard) Ship product worth at least 1000gp through enemy territory and sell the product. Return through enemy territory to the Guild.
(Narcotics Hard) Takeover a rival's production chain.
(Protection Easy) Intimidate a target into buying protection worth at least 10gp a week.
(Protection Easy) Intimidate a target into buying protection worth at least 20gp a week.
(Protection Easy) Retreive stolen weekly earnings from enemy. Return earnings to the Guild.
(Protection Easy) Re-intimidate a non-paying customer.
(Protection Easy) Succesfully assault a non-paying customer without getting caught.
(Protection Medium) Intimidate a target into buying protection worth at least 250gp a week.
(Protection Medium) Negotiate an increase in a target's weekly payoff by 25%.
(Protection Medium) Destroy a rival's racket and escape.
(Protection Medium) Negotiate an increase in a target's weekly payoff by 50%, but decrease the payments to twice a month.
(Protection Medium) Set physical or magical traps to destroy a non-paying customer's home or business.
(Protection Hard) Intimidate a target into buying protection worth at least 500gp a week.
(Protection Hard) Intimidate a political target into buying protection.
(Protection Hard) Negotiate an increase in a target's weekly payoff by 75%.
(Protection Hard) Renegotiate an increase in at least 10 target's weekly payoffs by 50%
(Protection Hard) Destroy a rival's businesses and remove them from doing business ever again.
(Smuggling Easy) Move goods worth at least 10gp.
(Smuggling Easy) Move goods worth at least 20gp.
(Smuggling Easy) Move goods through a low physical-security checkpoint.
(Smuggling Easy) Pick up goods worth at least 20gp in enemy territory and successfully
(Smuggling Easy) Move live cargo without being seen and return
(Smuggling Medium) Move goods worth at least 500gp.
(Smuggling Medium) Move goods through a high physical-security checkpoint.
(Smuggling Medium) Move goods through enemy territory at pick up goods worth at least 500gp and return
(Smuggling Medium) Move goods worth at least 250gp through moving magical surveillance.
(Smuggling Medium) Move goods worth at least 250gp via air.
(Smuggling Hard) Move goods worth at least 1000gp.
(Smuggling Hard) Move goods worth at least 500gp through magical-security checkpoint.
(Smuggling Hard) Move goods worth at least 500gp inside a political or royal shipment.
(Smuggling Hard) Move goods worth at least 500gp via planar teleportation.
(Smuggling Hard) Move live cargo through enemy territory and
(Street Easy) Pickpocket 10gp or equivalent goods.
(Street Easy) Pickpocket 20gp or equivalent goods.
(Street Easy) Pickpocket an official paper.
(Street Easy) Successfully mug 3 targets in 1 day.
(Street Easy) Mug a target for at least 30gp or equivalent goods.
(Street Medium) Pickpocket 250gp or equivalent goods
(Street Medium) Mug a group of targets for 100gp or equivalent goods
(Street Medium) Mug a political target.
(Street Medium) Pickpocket 10 targets in 1 day.
(Street Medium) Pickpocket a magic item.
(Street Hard) Pickpocket a royal target of some valuable, personal or otherwise.
(Street Hard) Mug a political target of 500gp or equivalent goods and escape.
(Street Hard) Pickpocket 3 magic items in 1 day.
(Street Hard) Mug a Guild Leader for at least 500gp or equivalent goods.
(Street Hard) Pickpocket an artefact.
